name: Carisbamate
description: Carisbamate has been investigated in Alcohol Abuse, Substance Abuse, and Alcohol Dependence.

interactions.name: Mefloquine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Carisbamate can be decreased when used in combination with Mefloquine.

interactions.name: Pregabalin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Carisbamate can be decreased when used in combination with Pregabalin.

interactions.name: Mianserin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Carisbamate can be decreased when used in combination with Mianserin.

interactions.name: Orlistat
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Carisbamate can be decreased when it is combined with Orlistat.
